name: Anvil
effect: Weapon upgrades can now have +1 to their stats, and you may be offered three choices instead of two.
unlock: To unlock the Anvil, the player must complete 3 Challenges.

name: Backpack
effect: +1 Projectile Count for all Weapons.
unlock: Unlocked by default.

name: Battery
effect: +8% Attack Speed.
unlock: Upgrade the Cooldown Tome to Level 5.

name: Beacon
effect: Charging a Charge Shrine creates a healing zone and spawns +2 extra Shrines in future stages.
unlock: Unlocked by default.

name: Beefy Ring
effect: Adds +20% Damage per 100 Max HP.
unlock: Unlocked by default.

name: Beer
effect: +20% Damage; -5% Max HP.
unlock: Available from the start.

name: Big Bonk
effect: 2% chance to BONK an enemy, dealing 20x damage.
unlock: Available from the start.

name: Bloody Cleaver
effect: Lifesteal now also triggers Bloodmark stacks, with a 50% chance to apply Bloodmark.
unlock: The specific unlock condition for the Bloody Cleaver is currently unconfirmed based on the provided data.

name: Bob (Dead)
effect: For every 14 units moved, summon Bob (dead).
unlock: Survive the Final Swarm for 2 minutes.

name: Bob's Light
effect: A sphere of light explodes every 45s, killing all nearby enemies. Stacks reduce cooldown by 3s and increases radius by 10m.
unlock: Kill Big Bob on Graveyard using the damage from a lamp as the killing blow.

name: Borgar
effect: +2% chance to spawn a healing Borgar upon killing an enemy.

name: Boss Buster
effect: +15% more damage to Elites and Bosses.
unlock: Defeat a Stage Boss in under 30 seconds.

name: Brass Knuckles
effect: Deal +20% more damage to nearby enemies.
unlock: Kill 5,000 enemies with the Sword.

name: Cactus
effect: Shoots spikes when taking damage, scaling with Thorns.
unlock: Kill 100 cactus enemies with Thorns damage.

name: Campfire
effect: Standing still heals you.
unlock: Available from the start.

name: Chonkplate
effect: Grants +20% Lifesteal and allows overheal up to 75% of Max HP.
unlock: Reach 500 Max HP.

name: Clover
effect: +7.5% Luck.

name: Cowards Cloak
effect: Boosts Move Speed when hit; +5% base Move Speed.
unlock: Available from the start.

name: Credit Card Green
effect: Permanently gain +2% Luck when opening a chest. Also increase Chest price by +10%.
unlock: The Credit Card (Green) is available from the start and can drop randomly from chests or appear as a reward during runs.

name: Credit Card Red
effect: Permanently gain +2.5% Damage when opening a chest.
unlock: The Credit Card (Red) is available from the start and can be found randomly in chests or as a run reward.

name: Cursed Doll
effect: Curses enemies, dealing 30% of their Max HP as damage per second.
unlock: Die 10 times.

name: Cursed Grabbies
effect: +10% Difficulty, 0.8x Max HP, 5% on-hit chance to cast curse.
unlock: Get the Cursed Tome to Level 10.

name: Demonic Blade
effect: Crits have a +25% chance to heal you
unlock: Heal for 350 HP using Lifesteal.

name: Demonic Blood
effect: Increase Max Hp by +0.5 per kill (Max 200 stacks)
unlock: Increase your Max HP with Blood Magic 400 times.

name: Demonic Soul
effect: +0.1% Damage per kill, up to +100%.
unlock: Reach Level 30 as Calcium.

name: Dragonfire
effect: 15% chance to summon dragonfire when hitting enemies. Fire damage can now apply burn.
unlock: Kill 4,000 enemies with fire damage.

name: Eagle Claw
effect: 66% Damage vs airborne enemies and 8% chance to launch them into the air.
unlock: Kill 10,000 enemies as Birdo.

name: Echo Shard
effect: +12% chance to spawn a bonus XP Shard on kill.
unlock: Upgrade the XP Tome to Level 8.

name: Electric Plug
effect: On taking damage, send out an electric shock.
unlock: Available from the start.

name: Energy Core
effect: Gives cooldown reduction and energy regeneration.
unlock: Defeat a Final Boss two times.

name: Feathers
effect: Lets you jump higher and further.
unlock: Available from the start.

name: Forbidden Juice
effect: Increase Crit Chance by +10%
unlock: Perform 100 critical hits in a single run.

name: Gamer Goggles
effect: Increase Damage the lower your HP is. chat im locking in
unlock: Defeat a Stage Boss with less than 10% HP.

name: Gas Mask
effect: Gain Armor and Overheal for each poisoned enemy.
unlock: Kill 5,000 enemies using Amog.

name: Ghost
effect: Summons ghosts using an interactable.
unlock: Survive the Final Swarm for 60 seconds.

name: Giant Fork
effect: You can eat so much spaghetti with this bad boi. Also crits have a chance to become Megacrits
unlock: The Giant Fork is unlocked by default. No challenges or requirements are needed — it is available from the start of the game.

name: Golden Glove
effect: +15% more gold from killing enemies.

name: Golden Ring
effect: It doesn't seem to do anything...
unlock: N/A

name: Golden Shield
effect: Gain gold when taking damage.
unlock: Available from the start.

name: Golden Sneakers
effect: Earn money by moving.
unlock: Break 150 pots.

name: Grandmas Secret Tonic
effect: Crits have a 50% chance to explode and damage nearby enemies for 50% damage
unlock: Kill 3,000 enemies with the Sniper Rifle.

name: Gym Sauce
effect: Increase Damage by +10%
unlock: Available from the start.

name: Holy Book
effect: +100 Max HP, +50 HP Regen. Healing radiates damaging energy to nearby enemies.
unlock: To unlock the Holy Book, the player must defeat a first Stage Boss without taking any damage.

name: Ice Crystal
effect: 7.5% freeze chance; executes enemies below threshold HP.
unlock: Get 50 kills with the Frostwalker weapon.

name: Ice Cube
effect: 20% chance to inflict ice damage when hitting enemies, which can freeze them.

name: Idle Juice
effect: Damage ramps up to +100% while standing still.
unlock: Kill 500 enemies while standing still.

name: Joes Dagger
effect: 1% chance to instantly Execute an enemy. Performing Execute increases Damage by 1%.
unlock: To unlock Joe’s Dagger, the player must kill 10,000 enemies using the Dexecutioner.

name: Kevin
effect: 25% chance to punch you on hit (cannot kill you). Triggers on-hit effects.
unlock: Obtain 3 Leeching Crystal items in one run.

name: Key
effect: +10% chance to open chests for free.
unlock: Purchase items from 25 chests.

name: Leeching Crystal
effect: +50% Max HP at the cost of -50% HP Regen.
unlock: Upgrade the Regen Tome to Level 8.

name: Lightning Orb
effect: 25% chance on hit to summon lightning that can stun enemies.
unlock: Kill 3,000 enemies with lightning damage.

name: Medkit
effect: +45 HP Regen (approx. 0.75 HP/sec).

name: Mirror
effect: Reflects all incoming damage and grants brief invulnerability.
unlock: Available from the start.

name: Moldy Cheese
effect: +40% chance to poison enemies on hit.

name: Moldy Gloves
effect: Create a moldy poison cloud upon hitting an enemy.
unlock: Use a Microwave to duplicate Moldy Cheese three times in a row.

name: Oats
effect: +25 Max HP.

name: Old Mask
unlock: Find on Graveyard

name: Overpowered Lamp
effect: +1 chance to proc on hit effects
unlock: Available from the start.

name: Phantom Shroud
effect: After evading, next hit deals 2x Damage and briefly boosts Attack Speed and Move Speed.
unlock: Unlocked by default.

name: Pot (Stainless Steel)
effect: +10  max levels for all weapons. Gives one less max  level per stack, for a minimum of 2 at 9 stacks.
unlock: Collect every pot and chest in the first crypt in Graveyard

name: Power Gloves
effect: 8% chance to create a giant blast on hit.
unlock: Available from the start.

name: Pumpkin
unlock: As Roberto, break every pumpkim on Graveyard

name: Quins Mask
effect: Thorns damage has a 50% chance to explode.
unlock: As Athena, land the killing blow on a Stage Boss using Aegis.

name: Scarf
effect: +50% Damage while airborne.
unlock: Available from the start.

name: Shattered Knowledge
effect: XP Shards slice through enemies while traveling.
unlock: Upgrade the Attraction Tome to Level 8.

name: Skuleg
effect: +7% Difficulty.
unlock: Reach a total of 40% Difficulty in a single run.

name: Slippery Ring
effect: +15% Evasion.

name: Slurp Gloves
effect: Cast blood magic on hit; heals 7.5% with an AoE burst (9s cooldown).
unlock: Available from the start.

name: Slutty Cannon
effect: 20% chance to spawn missiles on kill.
unlock: Kill 5,000 enemies with the Slutty Rocket.

name: Snek
effect: Apply +4 stacks of poison and a 5% chance to instantly burst all the poison damage when hitting an enemy
unlock: Find the hidden chest in the graveyard crypt. (View the discussion tab for spoilers and hints for where the chest is located.)

name: Soul Harvester
effect: Killing an enemy summons two homing souls that attack other enemies.
unlock: Survive the Final Swarm for 6 minutes.

name: Speed Boi
effect: Upon taking damage below 50% Max HP, slow down time and deal 2x damage.
unlock: To unlock Speed Boi, the player must complete a stage with at least 2 Boss Curses active.

name: Spicy Meatball
effect: Attacks have a 25% chance to explode, dealing 65% Damage to surrounding enemies
unlock: Available from the start.

name: Spiky Shield
effect: Gain +2 Thorns per 1% Armor and +10% Armor.
unlock: Available from the start.

name: Sucky Magnet
effect: Periodically pulls in all XP gems on the screen.
unlock: To unlock the Sucky Magnet, the player must complete every single Charge Shrine on the map in a single run.

name: Tactical Glasses
effect: +20% more damage to enemies above 90% HP.
unlock: Defeat a Miniboss in under 25 seconds.

name: Thunder Mitts
effect: On hit, generate a lightning strike (10s cooldown).
unlock: Available from the start.

name: Time Bracelet
effect: +8% XP Gain.

name: Toxic Barrel
effect: Releases a toxic cloud when hit.
unlock: Kill 2,000 enemies using Poison damage.

name: Turbo Skates
effect: Move Speed converts to Attack Speed (max +40% per stack).
unlock: Upgrade both the Cooldown Tome and Agility Tome to Level 5 in the same run.

name: Turbo Socks
effect: +15% Movement Speed.
unlock: Upgrade the Agility Tome to Level 5.

name: Unstable Transfusion
effect: Has a 27% chance to apply Bloodmark on hit.
unlock: Unlocked by default.

name: Wizard's Hat
effect: Functions as a pot but for Tomes
unlock: As Vlad, use Pot (Stainless Steel) to upgrade any weapon above the max level of 40.

name: Wrench
effect: Charge Shrines 4% faster and gain 7.5% increased rewards.
unlock: The Wrench is available from the start and does not require any special conditions to obtain.

name: Za Warudo
effect: On fatal damage, time freezes once to prevent death.
unlock: Unlocked by default.
